name: EverAfter Planner
tagline: Plan your wedding in one calm place.
shortDescription: Manage checklist, budget, guests, vendors, timeline, seating, reminders, and settings in one shared planning space.
description: EverAfter Planner helps couples organize wedding planning from one clean iPhone workspace. Track progress across checklist phases, keep budget visibility, manage guests and RSVPs, coordinate vendors, run a clear day-of timeline, and handle reminders in one place.

features: Shared and personal planner switching
Phase-based wedding checklist tracking
Budget estimates versus actual spend
Guest list and RSVP contact management
Vendor organization and follow-up reminders
Wedding day timeline builder
Seating and table assignment overview
Central reminder center for planning tasks

faqs.question: Is EverAfter Planner free?
faqs.answer: Yes. EverAfter Planner is listed as free in the product catalog. If optional paid features are added later, the product page and privacy policy should be updated before release.

faqs.question: What does EverAfter Planner help with?
faqs.answer: It helps couples organize wedding planning tasks such as checklists, budgets, guest tracking, vendor coordination, timelines, seating, and reminders from one calm planning workspace.

faqs.question: Where can I download EverAfter Planner?
faqs.answer: Use the App Store button on the product page to open the official Apple App Store listing.

faqs.question: How do I get support?
faqs.answer: Use the App Support link on the product page or the support portal to submit questions, bug reports, and app feedback.

faqs.question: Does the app have a privacy policy?
faqs.answer: Yes. The product page links to the site privacy policy so reviewers and users can quickly review data and support information.

name: GigTracker
tagline: Track miles, earnings, expenses, and invoices across Apple devices.
shortDescription: GigTracker helps gig workers and independent drivers log trips, review earnings, capture expenses, manage invoices, and stay on top of business follow-ups from iPhone, Mac, and Apple Watch.
description: GigTracker is a mileage and business tracker built for delivery drivers, freelancers, and independent operators who need more than a simple trip log. Track drives automatically, organize trips, review earnings, capture expenses, draft invoices, monitor reports, and work through a business inbox from one cross-device Apple workflow.

screenshots.alt: GigTracker dashboard with daily mileage, earnings, and trip activity overview
GigTracker trips screen with logged drives and mileage history
GigTracker earnings screen with payout tracking and performance totals
GigTracker expenses screen for tracking costs and receipts
GigTracker invoices screen for drafting and managing client billing
GigTracker reports screen with business summaries and trend breakdowns
GigTracker inbox surfacing follow-ups, unclassified work, and outstanding tasks
GigTracker more screen with settings, tools, and additional business controls

features: Automatic and manual trip tracking
Mileage history with trip review and classification
Earnings tracking across gigs and clients
Expense logging with receipt-friendly workflows
Invoice drafting and follow-up management
Business reports and summary insights
Cross-device workflow across iPhone, Mac, and Apple Watch
Widget and Live Activity support for quick status views

faqs.question: Is GigTracker free?
faqs.answer: Yes. GigTracker is listed as free in the product catalog and links to the official App Store listing when available.

faqs.question: Who is GigTracker for?
faqs.answer: GigTracker is designed for delivery drivers, freelancers, and independent operators who need to track trips, earnings, expenses, invoices, and business follow-ups.

faqs.question: What Apple devices does GigTracker support?
faqs.answer: The product page lists support across iPhone, Mac, and Apple Watch workflows, with compatibility details shown in the app card and product snapshot.

faqs.question: How do I report a problem with GigTracker?
faqs.answer: Open the product page and use the Support link to route the issue through the support portal.

faqs.question: Does GigTracker collect personal data?
faqs.answer: The privacy policy explains the categories of app data and device permissions that may be used for mileage, receipt, notification, and cross-device workflows.

releaseNotes.description: Updated the listing with free pricing, clearer compatibility, and product support paths.

releaseNotes.description: Added screenshots, feature summary, support links, and App Store metadata to the site.

name: Fantasy Football OBS Overlay
tagline: Show fantasy football scores, matchups, and alerts on your OBS stream.
shortDescription: Fantasy Football OBS Overlay displays live fantasy football matchups, score changes, tickers, and alerts as browser-source overlays for OBS.
description: Fantasy Football OBS Overlay is a local app for streamers who want fantasy football graphics inside OBS. It creates browser-source overlay pages that can show weekly matchups, score updates, ticker views, touchdown alerts, and simple broadcast layouts. It supports Yahoo, ESPN, Sleeper, and mock mode, with an admin page and setup center to help configure the overlay before going live.

providerBadges.name: Yahoo
providerBadges.description: Connect Yahoo Fantasy league data after setting up the provider connection.

providerBadges.name: ESPN
providerBadges.description: Use ESPN league details to show matchup and scoring overlays.

providerBadges.name: Sleeper
providerBadges.description: Connect Sleeper league data for fantasy football overlay scenes.

providerBadges.name: Mock Mode
providerBadges.description: Test OBS scenes and layouts without connecting a live fantasy account.

screenshots.alt: Fantasy Football OBS Overlay admin configuration panel with provider settings and runtime controls
Fantasy Football OBS Overlay centered card scene showing a featured fantasy matchup
Fantasy Football OBS Overlay lower-third scene for a compact fantasy football broadcast layout
Fantasy Football OBS Overlay sidebar two-up scene with multiple matchups visible at once
Fantasy Football OBS Overlay bottom ticker scene for scrolling matchup updates in OBS

features: Adds fantasy football graphics to OBS as browser-source overlays
Shows matchups, score updates, ticker layouts, and game alerts
Supports Yahoo, ESPN, Sleeper, and mock mode
Includes a setup page with copy-ready OBS scene URLs
Includes an admin page for league and provider settings
Offers multiple layouts including centered card, lower-third, sidebar, and ticker
Can run locally before a stream so overlays can be tested safely
Includes optional OBS WebSocket, Discord, Slack, and export integrations
minIOSVersion: OBS Browser Source + local Node.js runtime
compatibility: OBS Browser Source, macOS, Windows, or Linux with Node.js 18.17+

faqs.question: Is Fantasy Football OBS Overlay free?
faqs.answer: Yes. The overlay is listed as a free open-source product and links to the GitHub project from the product page.

faqs.question: What does the overlay do?
faqs.answer: It creates browser-source overlay pages for OBS so streamers can show fantasy football matchups, score changes, ticker views, and simple broadcast graphics.

faqs.question: Which fantasy providers can it work with?
faqs.answer: The product page lists Yahoo, ESPN, Sleeper, and Mock Mode as provider or testing workflows for the overlay setup.

faqs.question: Can I test it without connecting a real account?
faqs.answer: Yes. Mock Mode is included so you can test OBS scenes and layout behavior before connecting live fantasy data.

faqs.question: What do I need to run it?
faqs.answer: The product page lists OBS Browser Source compatibility and a local Node.js runtime requirement. The quick-start section includes basic setup commands.

releaseNotes.title: Provider badges and setup guide added
releaseNotes.description: Added Yahoo, ESPN, Sleeper, and Mock Mode badges plus OBS quick-start guidance to the product page.

releaseNotes.title: Product description simplified
releaseNotes.description: Reworked the public copy to explain the overlay in plain language for streamers and reviewers.

name: FATT Football
tagline: A free fantasy football companion app for leagues, news, mock drafts, and direct app links.
shortDescription: FATT Football is a free iPhone app that opens fantasy football league views, news, mock drafts, and app sections through universal links.
description: FATT Football is a free iPhone fantasy football companion app. It is designed to keep fantasy football navigation simple: users can open league views, news details, mock draft screens, and general app sections directly from supported tamemj.com universal links. It focuses on quick access to the fantasy football screens users revisit most instead of trying to replace a full fantasy platform.

screenshots.alt: FATT Football dashboard concept with league summary, standings, and matchup status
FATT Football matchup screen concept with team comparisons and projected scoring
FATT Football waiver and roster moves concept with add-drop planning
FATT Football player research concept with trends, notes, and API-backed insights

features: Universal links for /open, /league, /news, and /mock-draft paths
Direct navigation into league views, team context, standings, and matchup screens
Fantasy football news detail links that open the relevant in-app view
Mock draft preparation screens for faster pre-draft planning
Scoped app-link handling so unrelated website URLs stay on the web
Free iPhone-first fantasy football companion workflow

faqs.question: What is FATT Football?
faqs.answer: FATT Football is a free iPhone fantasy football companion app with universal links for league views, news, mock drafts, and quick app sections.

faqs.question: Is the app free?
faqs.answer: Yes. The product catalog lists FATT Football as a free app.

faqs.question: Which universal links does the app support?
faqs.answer: The app association file supports /open/*, /league/*, /news/*, and /mock-draft/* paths on tamemj.com. Other paths are excluded from opening the app.

faqs.question: What happens if the app is not installed?
faqs.answer: Supported links continue to work as normal web URLs when the app is not installed, giving users a safe fallback experience.

faqs.question: Why is the app still marked in development?
faqs.answer: The page remains marked in development until a public App Store URL is added to the catalog. The universal-link identity can still be reviewed before release.
